en.text: from H6852 (in the denominative sense (from H6833) of scratching); properly, a claw, i.e. (human) nail; also the point of astyle (or pen, tipped with adamant)

senses.gloss_en: from H6852 (in the denominative sense (from H6833) of scratching); properly, a claw, i.e. (human) nail; also the point of astyle (or pen, tipped with adamant)
